The Vortex Coalition
voco_smp
Vortex Coalition Survival Multi-Player :arrow_right: smp.joinvo.co
coltsnid 05-Mar-20 03:18 AM
Introducing VoCo SMP VoCo SMP is a private Survival Multiplayer Vanilla Minecraft server for 1.15.2! This server is not an anarchy server. It is intended to be a small community server for high ranking VoCo Members (Eminent+) To keep things in order, there are some rules: 1. No Griefing or Stealing 2. No Hacks or Exploits (e.g. xray/duping); You must use a Vanilla 1.15.2 client. 3. Be friendly All VoCo TOS rules still apply as well. As a high ranking VoCo Member, you are being trusted to play fair according to these rules. There will be plugins on the server that can detect rule breaking, and offenders will be banned not just from the Minecraft server, but VoCo as a whole. If you are Eminent+ and interested in joining, you can apply for the whitelist using the following form: https://forms.gle/xbRbGkZPTvgN2DJR7 (edited)
VoCo SMP Whitelist Application
To apply for the VoCo SMP Whitelist, you must be at least Eminent or above. YOU MUST ALSO READ ALL OF THE RULES IN #voco_smp CHAT
Pinned a message.
VoCo SMP will open when we have 5 or more approved applications

tbi 07-Mar-20 12:51 AM

coltsnid 07-Mar-20 01:09 AM
New Datapacks! There have been 4 new datapacks added to VoCo SMP! - One Player Sleep: only one person needs to sleep to skip night - AFK display: greys out names of afk players in tab - Coordinates HUD: type /trigger ch_toggle to see your coords/direction without needing to press F3 - Nether Portal Coords: type /trigger nc_inOverworld or /trigger nc_inNether (depending where you are) to see coords of the other dimension
Pinned a message.
tbi 07-Mar-20 01:33 AM
also are we allowed to use map mods? or for that matter wdl mods? (edited)
coltsnid 07-Mar-20 02:29 AM
Negative, the only allowed client modification is Optifine
Auto Fish farms are allowed but you cannot use any client modifications to aide you. Here is a way to afk fish at the standard setup in vanilla: F3 + P to disable automatic Pause; After that hold down right click; Press F3 + T to reload resource pack; Tab out while it's reloading, and you will still be stuck right-clicking (edited)
Pinned a message.
this is the standard design btw

coltsnid 09-Mar-20 03:05 AM
thanks i'll dye them to something else soon
oh
does anybody know how to get stable FPS on Minecraft 1.15? I'm on a Core i7 and GTX 1650 and i'm getting so many choppy frames i can't stand it
this laptop should be more than enough to run minecraft but i feel like i get 30fps half the time
and does anyone know what the new FPS means?
scouttea 09-Mar-20 03:12 AM
i think you might have it capped at 30
coltsnid 09-Mar-20 03:36 AM
nah its unlimited
that second number fluctuates, usually is just a bit below the first
i thought it might be average but it doesn't move like an average fps
maybe lowest frame of the last so many frames?
scouttea 09-Mar-20 03:38 AM
It's from optifine, added in the newest update. extended Show FPS and debug screen to show minimum FPS
thats a quote btw
"If you open video settings -> other and hover over "Show FPS", it will tell you what each value represents."
coltsnid 09-Mar-20 03:43 AM
figured it out
i recently bought a new USB C hub that i was using for HDMI and mouse/kb
that way i just had to plug in one cable for HDMI and all my USB stuff
looks like it caps at 30fps or is just shitty
scouttea 09-Mar-20 03:44 AM
or both
coltsnid 09-Mar-20 03:46 AM
using HDMI directly into my laptop it seems a lot smoother
idk though, that minimum fps still drops sometimes
yeah i'm still getting some jittery frames when i move around quickly
and i think it gets worse when i'm using both monitors
the real question is why am i barely getting 50 fps on minecraft in 2020 on a brand new laptop with a i7 and GTX 1650
mobile processors but still very powerful. I can run Dying Light at med-high 60fps

Pork 10-Mar-20 05:17 PM

Pork 10-Mar-20 05:54 PM
Salamander, the map has 2 versions: a flat low poly version, and a hires 2.5D version, to switch between the two click the small arrow in the right part of the screen to open the menu, then, under the World category, switch from the flat version to the other one. (edited)

Vacant 11-Mar-20 12:01 PM
That's just normal behavior because you have way less available spawning spaces than everybody else on. There's an option in paper.yml to enable per player mob spawns and then the mob spawning acts more like if everybody was playing in singleplayer and your farm would behave like in the video but it's not very "vanilla"

you don't need a special mod to do it right

coltsnid 11-Mar-20 12:17 PM

its really not hard
Pork 11-Mar-20 12:17 PM

coltsnid 11-Mar-20 12:17 PM

scouttea 11-Mar-20 12:18 PM

scouttea 11-Mar-20 12:19 PM

coltsnid 11-Mar-20 12:19 PM

coltsnid 11-Mar-20 12:22 PM

no matter how you find the dark spot its gonna need to be lit up
and we can't be putting fancy redstone lamps every 12 blocks
lighting up a base isn't gonna be pretty if you want it done properly
scouttea 11-Mar-20 12:23 PM

and check you haven(t made a new spot
